events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Saint Francis Memorial for client 1046. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic. Allergies: fish. Sodium ceiling 800 mg/meal, carbs 40–55 g/meal. Prefers Mediterranean; dislikes cilantro, pork. Cooking ability: microwave. 5 meals/week, zone Western Addition.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Baked Cod with Herbed Couscous
Rejected: Falafel Plate with Hummus
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 57 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/800 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 40–55) ✓, no fish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/800 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 40–55) ✓, no fish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Hummus and Veggie Wrap
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 451/800 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 40–55) ✓, no fish ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1046 added to route R-WEST-1 (Western Addition), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1046: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
